gomodel:run-figure2-003/fshr1/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol fshr-1 resolved to WB:WBGene00008239 (C. elegans GPCR/FSH-like receptor).

gomodel:run-figure2-003/tir1/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol tir-1 (SARM1 ortholog) resolved to WB:WBGene00006575.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/pmk1/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol pmk-1 (p38 MAPK) resolved to WB:WBGene00004055.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hsp60/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol hsp-60 (mitochondrial chaperonin) resolved to WB:WBGene00002025.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/atfs1/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol atfs-1 (ATF/UPRmt TF) resolved to WB:WBGene00013878.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hif1/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol hif-1 (hypoxia-inducible factor) resolved to WB:WBGene00001851.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/aak2/enabled_by.snippet: Figure label 'AMPK' = C. elegans aak-2 catalytic subunit, resolved to WB:WBGene00020142.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/daf16/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol daf-16 (FOXO TF) resolved to WB:WBGene00000912.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/skn1/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol skn-1 (Nrf2 TF) resolved to WB:WBGene00004804.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hsf1/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol hsf-1 (heat shock TF) resolved to WB:WBGene00002004.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/atf7/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol atf-7 (bZIP TF, PMK-1 substrate) resolved to WB:WBGene00000223.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/zip4/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol zip-4 (bZIP TF) resolved to WB:WBGene00021552.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp1/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol cebp-1 (C/EBP bZIP TF) resolved to WB:WBGene00016997.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp2/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol cebp-2 (C/EBP bZIP TF) resolved to WB:WBGene00016754.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/zip2/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol zip-2 (bZIP TF) resolved to WB:WBGene00019327.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/nhr86/enabled_by.snippet: Symbol nhr-86 (HNF4-like nuclear receptor) resolved to WB:WBGene00003676.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/fshr1/molecular_.snippet: fshr-1 annotated to G protein-coupled receptor activity (IEA); GPCR transducing the intestinal immune signal.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/tir1/molecular_f.snippet: tir-1 annotated to signaling adaptor activity (IDA); SARM1-like adaptor that nucleates the NSY-1/SEK-1/PMK-1 cassette.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/nsy1/molecular_f.snippet: nsy-1 annotated to MAP kinase kinase kinase activity (IDA); MAPKKK of the p38 cassette.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/sek1/molecular_f.snippet: sek-1 annotated to MAP kinase kinase activity (IDA); MAPKK of the p38 cassette.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/pmk1/molecular_f.snippet: pmk-1 annotated to MAP kinase activity (IDA); p38 MAPK terminal kinase of the cassette.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hsp60/molecular_.snippet: hsp-60 annotated to ATP-dependent protein folding chaperone; mitochondrial chaperonin, UPRmt reporter/effector.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/atfs1/molecular_.snippet: atfs-1 annotated to DNA-binding transcription factor activity (RNA Pol II-specific, IMP); UPRmt master TF.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hif1/molecular_f.snippet: hif-1 annotated to DNA-binding transcription factor activity; hypoxia/iron-responsive TF.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/aak2/molecular_f.snippet: aak-2 annotated to AMP-activated protein kinase activity (IDA); AMPK catalytic subunit (figure label 'AMPK').

gomodel:run-figure2-003/daf16/molecular_.snippet: daf-16 annotated to DNA-binding transcription activator activity, RNA Pol II-specific (IDA); FOXO stress TF.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/skn1/molecular_f.snippet: skn-1 annotated to DNA-binding transcription factor activity (IDA); Nrf2-like oxidative-stress TF.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hsf1/molecular_f.snippet: hsf-1 direct GO annotations returned only protein binding; transferred DNA-binding transcription factor activity from human HSF1, the heat-shock master TF.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/atf7/molecular_f.snippet: atf-7 annotated to DNA-binding transcription factor activity (IEA); bZIP TF, direct PMK-1 substrate.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/zip4/molecular_f.snippet: zip-4 annotated to DNA-binding transcription factor activity, RNA Pol II-specific (IMP); bZIP regulator of zip-2.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp1/molecular_.snippet: cebp-1 direct GO annotations returned only protein binding; transferred DNA-binding transcription factor activity from mouse Cebpb (C/EBPbeta bZIP TF).

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp2/molecular_.snippet: cebp-2 annotated to DNA-binding transcription factor activity (IEA); bZIP partner in the zip-2 response.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/zip2/molecular_f.snippet: zip-2 annotated to DNA-binding transcription factor activity (IEA); bZIP TF driving antibacterial defence genes (e.g. irg-1).

gomodel:run-figure2-003/nhr86/molecular_.snippet: nhr-86 annotated to DNA-binding transcription factor activity (IEA); HNF4-like nuclear-receptor TF of antibacterial defence genes.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/fshr1/part_of.snippet: fshr-1 annotated to defense response to Gram-negative bacterium (IMP); receptor initiating the intestinal anti-Pseudomonas response.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/tir1/part_of.snippet: tir-1 adaptor placed in innate immune response.
gomodel:run-figure2-003/tir1/part_of.justification: tir-1 direct slim BPs were serotonin biosynthesis / cell-fate / bare signal transduction (GORULE discourages GO:0007165). Figure places TIR-1 as the adaptor initiating the intestinal p38 immune cassette; innate immune response (GO:0045087) is the supported pathway BP.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/nsy1/part_of.snippet: nsy-1 annotated to MAPK cascade (IGI); MAPKKK step of the p38 cascade.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/sek1/part_of.snippet: sek-1 annotated to MAPK cascade (IGI); MAPKK step of the p38 cascade.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/pmk1/part_of.justification: pmk-1 slim returned MF (MAP kinase activity) + binding but no BP term; pmk-1 is the canonical p38 MAPK terminal kinase of the NSY-1/SEK-1/PMK-1 cassette, so part_of MAPK cascade (GO:0000165) is the supported process.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hsp60/part_of.snippet: hsp-60 annotated to mitochondrial unfolded protein response (IMP/IEP); mitochondrial chaperonin of the UPRmt.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/atfs1/part_of.snippet: atfs-1 annotated to mitochondrial unfolded protein response (IMP); UPRmt master TF that drives ESRE/stress genes.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hif1/part_of.snippet: hif-1 annotated to response to hypoxia (IMP); iron/hypoxia-responsive TF driving ESRE genes.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/aak2/part_of.snippet: aak-2/AMPK placed in cellular response to reactive oxygen species.
gomodel:run-figure2-003/aak2/part_of.justification: aak-2 slim BPs are lifespan/dauer/pharyngeal pumping, none matching the figure context. Figure shows mtROS activating AMPK, so cellular response to reactive oxygen species (GO:0034614) is the supported BP for this node; no direct annotation exists for it.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/daf16/part_of.snippet: daf-16/FOXO placed in regulation of DNA-templated transcription (TF endpoint).
gomodel:run-figure2-003/daf16/part_of.justification: daf-16 slim gave MF (activator activity) + DNA binding but no regulation-of-transcription BP; as a sequence-specific TF endpoint driving cellular-stress-response genes it is part_of regulation of DNA-templated transcription (GO:0006355) per the TF endpoint pattern.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/skn1/part_of.snippet: skn-1/Nrf2 placed in regulation of DNA-templated transcription (TF endpoint).
gomodel:run-figure2-003/skn1/part_of.justification: skn-1 slim BP was only response to superoxide (IEP, weak). As the Nrf2-like TF endpoint driving cellular-stress-response genes in the figure, part_of regulation of DNA-templated transcription (GO:0006355) per the TF endpoint pattern.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hsf1/part_of.snippet: hsf-1 placed in regulation of DNA-templated transcription, transferred from human HSF1 (heat-shock master TF); figure shows HSF-1 driving antimicrobial defence genes.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/atf7/part_of.snippet: atf-7 annotated to defense response to Gram-negative bacterium (IMP); PMK-1 substrate TF activating antimicrobial defence genes.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/zip4/part_of.snippet: zip-4 annotated to regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II (IMP); bZIP regulator of zip-2.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp1/part_of.snippet: cebp-1 placed in regulation of DNA-templated transcription, transferred from mouse Cebpb (C/EBPbeta); figure shows CEBP-1/2 box activating zip-2.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp2/part_of.snippet: cebp-2 annotated to regulation of DNA-templated transcription (IEA); bZIP partner activating zip-2.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/zip2/part_of.snippet: zip-2 annotated to defense response to Gram-negative bacterium (IMP); bZIP TF driving antibacterial/ESRE genes.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/nhr86/part_of.snippet: nhr-86 annotated to defense response to Gram-negative bacterium (IMP); HNF4-like TF regulating antibacterial defence genes.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/fshr1/occurs_in.snippet: fshr-1 annotated to plasma membrane (IEA/IBA); receptor on the intestinal brush-border membrane in the figure.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hsp60/occurs_in.snippet: hsp-60 annotated to mitochondrion (IDA); also captures the figure's Mitochondria<->HSP-60 connector (HSP-60 is the mitochondrial UPRmt chaperonin).

gomodel:run-figure2-003/aak2/occurs_in.snippet: AMPK (aak-2) is drawn inside the Mitochondria sub-compartment box of the intestinal cell, receiving the mtROS signal.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/atfs1/occurs_in.snippet: atfs-1 annotated to nucleus (IDA); nuclear-translocating UPRmt TF.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/atf7/occurs_in.snippet: atf-7 annotated to nucleus (IEA); TF acting at antimicrobial defence gene promoters.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hif1/occurs_in.justification: hif-1 slim lacked a CC term; as a DNA-binding TF acting at ESRE it functions in the nucleus, consistent with the figure drawing HIF-1 sending an arrow into the nucleus.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/daf16/occurs_in.justification: daf-16 slim lacked a CC term; as the FOXO TF acting at stress-gene promoters it functions in the nucleus, consistent with the figure arrow into the nucleus.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/skn1/occurs_in.justification: skn-1 slim lacked a CC term; as the Nrf2-like TF acting at stress-gene promoters it functions in the nucleus, consistent with the figure arrow into the nucleus.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hsf1/occurs_in.snippet: hsf-1 placed in nucleus, transferred from human HSF1 nuclear localization; figure draws HSF-1 sending an arrow into the nucleus.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp1/occurs_in.snippet: cebp-1 placed in nucleus, transferred from mouse Cebpb nuclear localization.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp2/occurs_in.justification: cebp-2 slim lacked a CC term; as a bZIP DNA-binding TF it functions in the nucleus, consistent with the figure placement in the intestinal-cell nuclear-input cluster.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/aak2/has_input/C.snippet: Mitochondria emits 'mtROS' with a (faint) connector to AMPK; modeled as mtROS = reactive oxygen species (CHEBI:26523) being the stimulus input that activates aak-2/AMPK.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hif1/has_input/C.snippet: Figure: Pyoverdine -> +Fe3+ -> HIF-1. Pseudomonas pyoverdine chelates ferric iron (iron(3+), CHEBI:29034); the resulting iron limitation is the stimulus that activates HIF-1. Routed as iron(3+) input to HIF-1 rather than an invalid HIF-1->HIF-1 self edge.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/tir1/causal/gomo.snippet: tir-1 signaling-adaptor activity is causally upstream, positive effect (indirectly positively regulates) of nsy-1 MAPKKK activity; figure inserts an intermediate (LRO stress / pH increase) between TIR-1 and NSY-1. Reviewed in 'Patterns of pathogenesis in innate immunity: insights from C. elegans'.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/nsy1/causal/gomo.snippet: nsy-1 (MAPKKK) directly positively regulates sek-1 (MAPKK) by phosphorylation in the canonical p38 cassette. Reviewed in 'Patterns of pathogenesis in innate immunity: insights from C. elegans'.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/sek1/causal/gomo.snippet: sek-1 (MAPKK) directly positively regulates pmk-1 (p38 MAPK) by phosphorylation in the canonical p38 cassette. Reviewed in 'Patterns of pathogenesis in innate immunity: insights from C. elegans'.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/pmk1/causal/gomo.snippet: pmk-1 (p38 MAPK) directly positively regulates atf-7 by phosphorylation, converting it from repressor to activator of antimicrobial defence genes. Reviewed in 'Patterns of pathogenesis in innate immunity: insights from C. elegans'.

Faint upward connector from PMK-1 toward the DAF-16/SKN-1/HSF-1 cluster (exact target ambiguous, conf 0.5). Modeled as pmk-1 causally upstream of, positive effect, of daf-16; mechanism/target uncertain - curator to verify which TF PMK-1 feeds.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/hsp60/causal/gom.snippet: Faint connector from HSP-60 toward the NSY-1 region (direction uncertain, conf 0.4). Modeled as hsp-60 causally upstream of, positive effect, of nsy-1, representing a mitochondrial-stress relay into the p38 cassette; direction/sign to be verified.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/aak2/causal/gomo.snippet: Faint downward connector from AMPK toward the nucleus/HIF-1 area (target ambiguous, conf 0.35). Modeled as aak-2/AMPK indirectly positively regulates hif-1 (kinase->TF, intervening steps); to be verified.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/zip4/causal/gomo.snippet: zip-4 (bZIP TF) indirectly negatively regulates zip-2; the figure also notes ZIP-4 receives input from the translation-block (ExoA) state. Reviewed in 'Unzipping the defense: bZIP transcription factors in C. elegans'.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp1/causal/gom.snippet: cebp-1 (C/EBP bZIP) indirectly positively regulates zip-2 (solid activation arrow from the CEBP-1/2 box). Reviewed in 'Unzipping the defense: bZIP transcription factors in C. elegans'.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/cebp2/causal/gom.snippet: cebp-2 (C/EBP bZIP) indirectly positively regulates zip-2; figure box labelled 'CEBP-1/2' sends a solid activation arrow to ZIP-2. Reviewed in 'Unzipping the defense: bZIP transcription factors in C. elegans'.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/nhr86/causal/gom.snippet: Ambiguous connector (PCN -> NHR-86 -> nucleus, conf 0.3). Modeled as nhr-86 indirectly negatively regulates zip-2; sign and existence of this edge to be verified by the curator.

gomodel:run-figure2-003/fshr1/causal/gom.snippet: Compartment-level edge: FSHR-1 (brush-border receptor) sends an ambiguous downward connector toward the nucleus labelled 'iron chelation signal' (conf 0.3). Interpreted as fshr-1 causally upstream of, positive effect, of the iron-responsive nuclear TF HIF-1 (most plausible nuclear target); to be verified.
